name: sap-architecture
description: Generate, validate, and autofix SAP / BTP / on-prem architecture diagrams as draw.io (.drawio) files following the official SAP BTP Solution Diagram Guidelines (Fiori Horizon palette, area/layer conventions, grey-circle service icons, connector semantics, L0-L3 levels). Bundles 99 SAP BTP service icons + 3 pristine L2 reference templates.
